import pandas as pd

def process_records(records):
    df = pd.DataFrame(records)
    df["total"] = df["price"] * df["quantity"]
    df["tax"] = df["total"] * 0.08
    return df

def enrich_data(items):
    df = pd.DataFrame(items)
    mean = df["score"].mean()
    std = df["score"].std()
    df["normalized"] = (df["score"] - mean) / std
    return df["normalized"].tolist()
